How it works

Three steps,
one hour.

No experience needed. Just show up, pick your palette, and drip.

01

Pick your bear

Choose your bear — 7" or 9" online. Bigger sizes available to upgrade in-store when in stock.

02

Drip

Drip your colors and let them run — marble it, splatter it, drown it. No two come out alike.

03

Keep it forever

Dries in 24–48 hrs. Grab it free in-store or we ship anywhere in the USA for $5.

Studios

Three spots
to drip.

Solo, date night, or the whole crew. All ages — guests 21+ can bring their own beverage.
